titles.title: God Will Make a Way – v2

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God will make a way Where there seems to be no way He works in ways we cannot see He will make a way for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He will be my guide Hold me closely to His side With love and strength for each new day He will make a way, He will make a way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, God will make a way Where there seems to be no way He works in ways we cannot see He will make a way for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He will be my guide Hold me closely to His side With love and strength for each new day He will make a way, He will make a way

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: By a roadway in the wilderness, He'll lead me Rivers in the desert will I see Heaven and earth will fade but His Word will still remain And He will do something new today

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: With love and strength for each new day He will make a way, He will make a way Yes, he will, he will make a way for you
